fallback.name: JCode Harness Cloud
fallback.tagline: Hosted MCP for OpenAI Codex harness MCP.
fallback.description: JCode Harness Cloud is a paid remote MCP endpoint for OpenAI Codex harness MCP. It exposes structured JSON tools, a public server card, token-based access, usage receipts, and audit-ready workflow evidence for AI agents and coding teams.
